Title: Green Digital Glitch Square Cropped Hoodie Sweatshirt
Description:
Celebrate unique digital aesthetics with this cool and edgy cropped hoodie. Featuring a striking, distressed green glitch square graphic, this sweatshirt is perfect for those who appreciate modern, tech-inspired designs.

The washed black material provides a high-contrast backdrop, making the vibrant green square pop. Whether you're dressing up for a concert or keeping it casual for a weekend outing, this hoodie adds a distinct artistic flair to any outfit.

  • Unique Design: The minimalist yet impactful glitch art makes a bold fashion statement.
  • Comfortable Fit: Designed for an ideal, relaxed fit and featuring a practical front pouch pocket.
  • Material Feel: Made from soft, high-quality fabric perfect for all-day wear.
  • Versatile Style: Pairs effortlessly with everything from ripped jeans to cargo pants.

This makes an excellent gift for anyone interested in streetwear, digital art, or alternative fashion.
